name: ferni-website
description: Ferni marketing website - design system integrated

scripts.build: npm run sync:tokens && eleventy && npm run css
scripts.build:prod: npm run sync:tokens && eleventy && npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/main.css -o ./_site/css/styles.css --minify && node scripts/minify.js
scripts.preview: npm run build && cd _site && python3 -m http.server 8080
scripts.deploy: npm run build:prod && firebase deploy --only hosting:ferni-landing
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:prod && firebase deploy --only hosting:ferni-prod
scripts.deploy:all: npm run build:prod && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.precommit: npm run lint:design && npm run audit:content
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:design && npm run audit:content
